channel.title: Midnight Whisperer
channel.description: Original horror audio dramas — fully voiced, sound-designed, and scored to pull you into the darkness. Best experienced with headphones in a dark room. New episodes every week. Watch the full visual experience on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MidnightWhispererDark
channel.itunes:author: Midnight Whisperer
channel.itunes:summary: Original horror audio dramas — fully voiced, sound-designed, and scored to pull you into the darkness. Best experienced with headphones in a dark room. New episodes every week. Watch the full visual experience on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MidnightWhispererDark

item.title: Episode 1: The Watcher | Unseen Terror
item.description: Midnight turns sinister as Nina and James find themselves trapped in a nightmare where an unseen force prowls outside their bedroom window. This episode delves into the chilling atmosphere of terror, with meticulous sound design that heightens the suspense. As the shadowy figure's presence grows more relentless, Nina and James must confront their deepest fears. Voice cast includes expert performers who bring this supernatural horror to life, immersing listeners in a world where every whisper could be a harbinger of doom. Content warnings: This episode contains intense horror elements and supernatural themes that may disturb some listeners. Watch the full visual experience with original artwork on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MidnightWhispererDark. Don't miss out—subscribe, rate, and review Midnight Whisperer to stay updated on new episodes of spine-chilling audio drama. Written and produced by Midnight Whisperer.
item.itunes:summary: In 'The Watcher', Nina and James face an unseen terror prowling outside their bedroom window, with the sound design enhancing every chilling moment in this supernatural horror tale.
item.itunes:keywords: horror podcast, scary stories, audio drama, supernatural thriller, unseen force, terror at night, chilling atmosphere, sound design, midnight whispers, spine-chilling audio, dark fiction, haunting sounds, narrative horror, unsettling suspense, mysterious figure, sanity test, horror audio drama, audio storytelling, unseen terror

item.title: Episode 2: Three Knocks. No One There. Every Night
item.description:
Every night at midnight, Daniel hears three mysterious knocks from inside his apartment walls. Who or what is behind them? Dive into a spine-chilling audio drama with immersive sound design and haunting voice acting by the talented Rachel. With each knock, the atmosphere thickens, leaving listeners on edge as they unravel the supernatural mystery plaguing Daniel's urban abode. Content warnings: This episode contains disturbing themes and may be unsettling for some listeners. Watch the full visual experience with original artwork on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MidnightWhispererDark. Don't forget to subscribe, rate, and review Midnight Whisperer in your podcast app.
Watch with original horror artwork on YouTube: https://youtu.be/_c2pFM3XCiQ
item.itunes:summary: In 'Three Knocks. No One There. Every Night', Daniel is plagued by nightly knocks from inside his walls. As the mystery unfolds, listeners are treated to a spine-chilling audio drama with immersive sound design and voice acting by Rachel, leaving them on edge until the very end.
item.itunes:keywords: horror podcast, scary stories, audio drama, supernatural mystery, urban horror, nightly knocks, midnight whisperer, spine-chilling tales, haunted apartment, mysterious sounds, immersive sound design, voice acting, creepy story, dark podcast, paranormal events

item.title: Episode 3: Three Knocks. No One There. Every Night.
item.description:
Midnight falls and the old stone cottage whispers secrets of the past. Maren inherits her grandmother's remote home, only to find it haunted by an eerie presence that grows stronger each night. The knocking begins at midnight, always from inside the walls. Who—or what—is trying to communicate with her? Will she uncover the truth behind the mystery before it’s too late? 'Three Knocks. No One There. Every Night.' is a chilling tale of suspense and supernatural intrigue brought to life by an exceptional voice cast including Maren, Bridget, Elspeth, and Gareth, with immersive sound design that transports you into the heart of the story. Content warnings: This episode contains horror elements and supernatural themes that may be unsettling for some listeners. Watch the full visual experience with original artwork on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MidnightWhispererDark Subscribe, rate, review on your podcast app to support 'Midnight Whisperer' and stay tuned for more spine-chilling stories.
Watch with original horror artwork on YouTube: https://youtu.be/mUA5vquETrg
item.itunes:summary: In Episode 3 of Midnight Whisperer, Maren inherits her grandmother’s remote stone cottage only to find it haunted by an eerie presence that grows stronger each night. The knocking begins at midnight from inside the walls. This chilling tale is brought to life with a voice cast including Maren, Bridget, Elspeth, and Gareth, along with immersive sound design.
item.itunes:keywords: horror podcast, scary stories, audio drama, supernatural thriller, eerie presence, midnight knocking, haunted house, ghost story, mystery tale, chilling suspense, creepy sound effects, voice cast, immersive atmosphere, dark supernatural
